name: EVgo Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview We are one of the nations leading public EV fast charging providers. With more than 1,200 fast charging stations across 47 states, we strategically deploy localized and accessible charging infrastructure by partnering with leading businesses across the U.S., including retailers, grocery stores, restaurants, shopping centers, gas stations, rideshare operators and autonomous vehicle companies. The foundation of our business is building, owning and operating EV fast charging sites...
